channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: All about Information Retrieval & Search
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: Sease
item.description: Sease About Italian search engineering and consulting company specializing in Apache Solr, Elasticsearch, and neural information retrieval.

item.title: Search Evaluation
item.description: Search Evaluation Definition Search evaluation is the systematic process of measuring how well a search system serves user information needs.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Index
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Hello, I am Andrew.

item.title: Relevance Program Setup
item.description: Relevance Program Setup A relevance program is the organizational and operational infrastructure that makes search quality measurable, reproducible, and improvable over time.

item.title: global_toc
item.description: Global Table of Contents A map of every note in the vault organized by category and theme.

item.title: How to Securely Hook Up Quepid to Vespa
item.description: A proof-of-concept for wiring the Quepid relevance workbench to a Vespa Cloud application using read-only token authentication, a Custom Search API endpoint, and JavaScript result mappers — filling Vespa's gap in interactive offline relevance testing.

item.title: Elasticsearch Relevance Studio
item.description: Elasticsearch Relevance Studio Elasticsearch Relevance Studio (ESRS) is Elastic’s tool for managing the full lifecycle of search relevance engineering on top of Elasticsearch — defining scenarios, collecting ground-truth judgments, building and benchmarking search strategies, and iterating to optimi...
